subject: [RFC PATCH 6/9 v2] mm/vmscan, memcontrol: Add nodemask to try_to_free_mem_cgroup_pages

2026-04-23.patch_summary: This patch adds a new nodemask parameter to the try_to_free_mem_cgroup_pages function, allowing selective reclaim on specific nodes. The new function signature is intended for future use in patches that will selectively perform reclaim on top-tier memory and apply downward pressure when top-tier limits are breached but overall memory group-wide limits have not been reached. Currently, all callers pass NULL to the nodemask parameter, resulting in no functional changes with this patch.
